scripts.dev:local: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local start
scripts.dev:services: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local start --services-only
scripts.dev:reset: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local reset
scripts.local:check: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local check --desktop
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local migrate
scripts.db:seed: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local seed
scripts.worker: uv run --project services/api python -m app.devtools.local worker
scripts.test:services: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run test:python
scripts.lint:python: uv run --project services/api ruff check services/api
scripts.contracts:generate: uv run --project services/api python scripts/export_openapi.py && npm run generate --workspace @fastlearner/contracts
scripts.ci:js: npm run lint:js && npm run typecheck && npm run test:js && npm run build
scripts.ci:python: npm run lint:python && uv run --project services/api mypy services/api/app && npm run test:python
scripts.ci:rust: npm run lint:rust && npm run test:rust
scripts.ci: npm run contracts:check && npm run format:check && npm run ci:js && npm run ci:python && npm run ci:rust
